cabinet.title: SETTINGS CONTROL ROOM
cabinet.subtitle: Profile, security, notification routing, active sessions, and privacy controls backed by live account APIs.

errors.partialDescription: The page stays usable, but refresh before making sensitive changes.

profile.title: Account profile
profile.description: Keep editable profile fields aligned with the backend profile record. Email and account ID remain immutable here.

security.title: Security console
security.description: Password, TOTP, and anti-phishing flows stay backend-owned and rate-limited.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.enabled: TOTP is active for this account.
twoFactor.disabled: Enable TOTP before increasing payment or device trust.

recovery.title: Lost authenticator recovery
recovery.description: If you lose the authenticator app, use support-assisted recovery. Support must verify identity and leave an audit trail before any 2FA reset.

password.title: Password
password.description: Change the password with current-password verification.

antiphishing.title: Anti-phishing code
antiphishing.disabled: Set a private code that appears in legitimate emails.

notifications.title: Notification preferences
notifications.description: Core account notifications and growth notifications are separate backend preference sets.

emailSecurity.title: Email security alerts
emailSecurity.description: Login, password, and account risk alerts.

pushConnection.title: VPN connection push
pushConnection.description: Connection, disconnect, and service state notices.

inAppInvites.title: Invite in-app feed
inAppInvites.description: Invite and code events inside the cabinet.

emailGifts.title: Gift code email
emailGifts.description: Gift redemption and delivery status by email.

devices.title: Active devices
devices.description: Review sessions and revoke stale devices without touching the current one.
devices.limitDescription: The limit comes from the current entitlement snapshot. Revoke stale sessions before connecting a new device.

limitHelp.available: {remaining} device slots are still available on this plan.
limitHelp.near_limit: Only {remaining} device slots remain. Revoke stale sessions before adding more devices.
limitHelp.at_limit: The plan limit is fully used. Revoke stale devices or change the plan before adding a new device.
limitHelp.over_limit: This account is over the current plan limit by {count}. Revoke stale devices or contact support.
limitHelp.unknown: The active session list is available, but the plan limit could not be loaded from entitlements.

devices.currentHint: This session is protected from remote revoke controls.

identity.title: External accounts
identity.description: Telegram remains the primary support and commerce identity where available.
identity.telegramMissing: Telegram is not linked to this account.

serverTruth.title: Backend is source of truth
serverTruth.description: The page reflects API state and does not persist sensitive settings locally.

noSecretTelemetry.title: No secret telemetry
noSecretTelemetry.description: Metrics mark actions only, never passwords, TOTP codes, IPs, or anti-phishing values.

sessionRevocation.title: Session revocation
sessionRevocation.description: Device removal calls authenticated backend session revoke endpoints.

accountDeletion.title: Deletion path
accountDeletion.description: Account deletion remains isolated in the dedicated privacy flow.

feedback.telegramLinkFailed: Could not start Telegram linking. Try again from this browser session.

title: SETTINGS
subtitle: Manage your account preferences and security
tfaDisabled: Add an extra layer of security
